ul.li: QUERY: Read-only access to DLQ partition.
SELECTION: Identify specific message offsets for recovery.
EXECUTION: POST request triggers atomic re-publication.
AuthZ: Verify caller has REPLAY_DLQ permission.
Decoding: Handles Avro/Protobuf to JSON conversion for UI.
Header Injection: Decorates messages with x-replayed: true to prevent recursive DLQ loops.
Batching: Processes replay requests in sequential or parallel streams.

div.p: Entries are stored as immutable records containing:

ul.li: Replayed messages receive NEW sequence IDs.
Broker Treates these as standard ingress.
CRITICAL: Downstream consumers MUST be idempotent to handle duplicate OrderIDs.
